articles.title: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
articles.snippet: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: in a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is Replit also bound to sell?

articles.why_it_matters: Reveals the intense competition and strategic decisions facing AI startups.
